tasks.label: rollback-test: create-journal
tasks.command: dotnet '${workspaceFolder}/markdown-journal-cli/bin/Debug/net10.0/markdown-journal-cli.dll' new RollbackTest --path /tmp/rollback-test && dotnet '${workspaceFolder}/markdown-journal-cli/bin/Debug/net10.0/markdown-journal-cli.dll' add --path /tmp/rollback-test/RollbackTest entry Alpha && dotnet '${workspaceFolder}/markdown-journal-cli/bin/Debug/net10.0/markdown-journal-cli.dll' add --path /tmp/rollback-test/RollbackTest entry Beta && echo '✓ Journal ready  →  Alpha.md  Beta.md  .journalrc  .mdjournal  1a-TableOfContents.md'

tasks.label: rollback-test: lock-toc
tasks.command: chmod 444 /tmp/rollback-test/RollbackTest/1a-TableOfContents.md && echo '🔒 Locked: 1a-TableOfContents.md  (TOC writes will fail → triggers rollback)'

tasks.label: rollback-test: lock-journalrc
tasks.command: chmod 444 /tmp/rollback-test/RollbackTest/.journalrc && echo '🔒 Locked: .journalrc  (config writes will fail → triggers rollback)'

tasks.label: rollback-test: lock-dir
tasks.command: chmod 555 /tmp/rollback-test/RollbackTest && echo '🔒 Locked dir: new-file creation blocked, existing-file writes still work'

tasks.label: rollback-test: unlock
tasks.command: chmod 755 /tmp/rollback-test/RollbackTest 2>/dev/null; chmod 644 /tmp/rollback-test/RollbackTest/.journalrc /tmp/rollback-test/RollbackTest/1a-TableOfContents.md /tmp/rollback-test/RollbackTest/.mdjournal 2>/dev/null && echo '🔓 All permissions restored — safe to retry'
